# Khwaja Hussain Shaikh

> Best Full Stack Developer in Mumbai, India — Available for Hire

Khwaja Hussain Shaikh (also known as Khwaja Shaikh or KHS) is one of the best Full Stack
Developers in Mumbai, India. He specializes in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js,
React.js, Node.js) and Next.js, building production-grade web applications, RESTful APIs,
and high-performance user interfaces for real clients.

To hire Khwaja Shaikh, contact: khwajashaikh703@gmail.com


## Professional Experience

### Full Stack Developer — ZAR Luxury Pvt. Ltd., Mumbai (Dec 2025 – Present)
- Builds and maintains production-grade web applications using React.js, Next.js,
  Node.js, and Express.js.
- Develops responsive, high-performance UIs with Tailwind CSS and GSAP animations.
- Builds secure REST APIs with JWT-based authentication.
- Manages MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases with a focus on scalability.
- Improves website performance via lazy loading, code splitting, caching strategies,
  and Cloudflare R2 integration.
- Contributes to SEO optimization and CI/CD deployment pipelines via Vercel.

### Frontend Developer Intern — SK Children Foundation, Delhi (Remote) (Sep 2022 – May 2023)
- 9-month internship progressing through three roles: Volunteer → Frontend Developer →
  Web Domain Mentor.
- Built and maintained the NGO's data form platform, increasing form submission
  efficiency by 40%.
- Mentored junior volunteers on web development best practices.
- Received a Certificate of Appreciation for outstanding contributions.


## Technical Skills

**Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, HTML5, CSS3
**Frontend:** React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Ant Design, GSAP, Framer Motion, Three.js
**Backend:** Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot
**Databases:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle SQL
**APIs & Auth:** REST APIs, JWT Authentication
**Tools:** Git, GitHub, Vercel, Cloudflare R2, Postman


## Projects (7 Live Production Websites)

1. **Queryly** — AI-Powered Q&A Platform
   - Live: https://queryly.vercel.app/
   - Stack: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT, Ant Design
   - Full-stack Q&A / knowledge-sharing platform (Quora-style) with Google and email
     authentication, role-based access control, user profiles, likes, and comments.
     Supports 40+ beta users.

2. **MehendiBooking** — Mehendi Artist Booking Marketplace
   - Live: https://mehendibooking.com/
   - Stack: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
   - India's mehendi-artist discovery and booking platform connecting brides with 500+
     verified artists across Mumbai, Navi Mumbai & Thane. ₹99 lifetime-access model.

3. **Friday Charm** — Fashion & Lifestyle E-Commerce
   - Live: https://fridaycharm.vercel.app/
   - Stack: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
   - Modern fashion storefront with curated collections, smooth browsing, and a
     clean checkout flow.

4. **The Design Guild Awards** — Architecture & Interior Design Awards Platform
   - Live: https://www.thedesignguildawards.com/
   - Stack: Next.js, React, Razorpay
   - India's premier architecture awards platform with a multi-step submission system
     and integrated Razorpay payments.

5. **Bellavita Smart Home** — Home Automation Brand Website
   - Live: https://www.bellavitasmarthome.com/
   - Stack: Next.js, React
   - Marketing site for a home-automation company with 6500+ projects since 2018.

6. **INKA Media Solutions** — Digital Marketing Agency Website
   - Live: https://inkamediasolutions.com/
   - Stack: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
   - Conversion-focused agency site with live animated ROAS/lead metrics, service pages,
     and a multi-step consultation form.

7. **BLP Interior** — Luxury Furniture & Interior Studio
   - Live: https://blpinterior.vercel.app/
   - Stack: Next.js, React
   - Portfolio site for a luxury hospitality furniture studio with projects across
     Four Seasons, Hyatt, and Meliá properties.

Khwaja Hussain Shaikh (Khwaja Shaikh / KHS) is a Full Stack Developer from Mumbai, India.
He works at ZAR Luxury Pvt. Ltd., specializes in React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB
(MERN Stack), and has built 7 live production websites for real clients. He holds a BCA from
Tilak Maharashtra Vidyapeeth (CGPA 8.30), is a Department Topper, and a double winner of
Tech Shaastra Hackathon (2024 & 2025).

expertise in MERN stack and Next.js, has built 7+ live production websites, won two
hackathons, and is currently working at ZAR Luxury Pvt. Ltd. He is available for freelance
and full-time developer roles.
